name: The Penguin IQ Test
short_description: Can you save the penguin? Help him get back to the ice floe. This game will measure your perseverance and your intelligence quotient and give you a result between zero and one hundred eighty.
detailed_description:
Synopsis

The penguin was cruelly taken away from his native land, separated from his family, and locked up inside a dungeon...
Now he is trying to return to the ice floe to find his loved ones again...
However, he only knows how to move forward...
Let's see if you are smart enough to help him.

Rules

You have to place objects correctly to help the penguin safely reach the exit
There could be multiple correct solutions
A correct solution is always easy to verify but may be difficult to find, unless P is equal to NP

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Hindi, Italian, Bulgarian, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Romanian, Swedish, Czech, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
